name: Proxy F Magician
name_jp: プロキシー・<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｆ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エフ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>・マジシャン
desc:
2 Effect Monsters
During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your field as Fusion Material. If a Fusion Monster(s) is Fusion Summoned to a zone(s) this card points to: You can Special Summon 1 monster with 1000 or less ATK from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Proxy F Magician" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
2 Effect Monsters
During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your field as Fusion Material. If a Fusion Monster(s) is Fusion Summoned to a zone(s) this card points to: You can Special Summon 1 monster with 1000 or less ATK from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Proxy F Magician" once per turn.
eff:
2 Effect Monsters
During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your field as Fusion Material. If a Fusion Monster(s) is Fusion Summoned to a zone(s) this card points to: You can Special Summon 1 monster with 1000 or less ATK from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Proxy F Magician" once per turn.

action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
summoning: Requires Effect Monsters as Link Materials
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
